misc: Rarely uses his driver, which has raised questions about his masculinity.
biography: Ossi, representing Kullo Golf Club, has been a consistent presence in the Hector Trophée, with the upcoming 2026 edition marking his fourth appearance in this unique competition. His return underscores a dedicated engagement with the tournament's demanding format, which blends individual prowess with the intricacies of pair play.

Despite his regular involvement, Ossi has yet to secure either the coveted Hector Trophée for the triumphant pair or the prestigious Victor Trophy for the leading individual. A distinctive aspect of Ossi's game often observed on the course is his infrequent reliance on the driver, a strategic choice that, while occasionally inviting playful comments concerning his approach, speaks to a meticulous and perhaps unconventional course management philosophy.

This calculated avoidance of the longest club in the bag, rather than signaling a lack of power, often indicates a preference for precision and control, a hallmark of his methodical style. As he prepares for his fourth outing, Ossi continues his quest for a breakthrough victory, bringing his unique blend of strategic thinking and quiet determination to the forefront of the Hector Trophée. His enduring presence promises another intriguing display of his distinct approach to the game.
